pages.text: The Memory Card is used to copy and paste machine configurations between Mekanism machines. It can store configuration from one machine and apply it to others.

pages.title: Copying
pages.text: To copy configuration:$(br)$(li)Sneak + Right-click a machine: Copy config and upgrades to the card$(br)$(br)The tooltip will show how many machines' config is stored.

pages.title: Pasting
pages.text: To paste configuration:$(br)$(li)Right-click a machine: Apply stored config to the target machine (consumes upgrade cards if needed)$(br)$(br)Requires matching machine type and sufficient upgrade cards in inventory.

pages.title: Modes
pages.text: The memory card has two modes:$(br)$(li)Copy Mode: For copying configurations$(li)Paste Mode: For pasting configurations$(br)$(br)Right-click in air to switch modes.
